issues.sample: TL*  THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 ACURA MDX.  THE CONTACT HEARD AN INTERMITTENT NOISE BEHIND THE DASHBOARD.  WHILE MAKING A TURN AT VARIOUS SPEEDS, THE POWER STEERING SEIZED AND CAUSED TEMPORARY LOSS OF CONTROL.  INITIALLY, THE DEALER COULD NOT DUPLICATE THE FAILURE.  THE DEALER LATER

MY BRAND NEW MDX HAS HAD ISSUES WITH MULTIPLE WARNING LIGHTS APPEARING ON THE VEHICLE WHEN STARTING THE ENGINE.  THIS INCLUDES CHECK ENGINE WARNING, LANE DEPARTURE WARNING FAILURE, POWER STEERING ISSUE AND POSSIBLY ADDITIONAL WARNINGS.  THE VEHICLE DID THIS THE FIRST TIME WHEN I

MY BRAND NEW MDX HAS HAD ISSUES WITH MULTIPLE WARNING LIGHTS APPEARING ON THE VEHICLE WHEN STARTING THE ENGINE.  THIS INCLUDES CHECK ENGINE WARNING, LANE DEPARTURE WARNING FAILURE, POWER STEERING ISSUE AND POSSIBLY ADDITIONAL WARNINGS.  THE VEHICLE DID THIS THE FIRST TIME WHEN I

WHEN COMING TO A SUDDEN STOP THE BRAKE LIGHT WILL FLASH ON THE DASHBOARD ACCOMPANIED BY A BEEPING SOUND FOR APPROXIMATELY 3 SECONDS.  I HAVE BROUGHT IT INTO THE DEALERS SHIP IN METAIRIE LOUISIANA AND AM TOLD THAT THEY CANNOT DUPLICATE THE PROBLEM.  THIS HAS OCCURRED APPROXIMATELY

YESTERDAY, AFTER BACKING UP, STEPPING ON THE BRAKE PEDAL AND COMING TO A COMPLETE STOP, SHIFTED INTO "PARK" WITH MY FOOT STILL ON THE BRAKE PEDAL.  THE ENGINE UNEXPECTEDLY REVVED UP TO WHAT SOUNDED LIKE FULL THROTTLE! I PUSHED THE IGNITION BUTTON TO STOP THE ENGINE.    AFTER THIS

narrative.headline: What 2014 Acura Mdx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 167 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (23% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
